critical_updates.details: Client continues to live at home with his mother and father. No changes to the address or household members.
Ongoing tension with father regarding paying rent. The father's construction hours were cut due to weather, adding financial stress to the household.

Currently enrolled in English, Intro to Psych, and College Algebra. Midterms are approaching. Client is struggling significantly with Algebra and is considering dropping the class, pending a check on how it impacts financial aid.
Client received more hours at the restaurant, but the new shift conflicts with Tuesday afternoon reporting times. The new shift starts at 4:30 PM, so supervision meetings were moved to 8:00 AM.
No new law enforcement contact reported. Client completed 5 hours of community service at a food bank. A restitution review hearing is upcoming, but the exact date is currently unknown.
Client submitted a urinalysis at Axiom lab one day late (Thursday instead of Wednesday for the blue color). The test result was negative, and the PO issued a warning rather than a violation.
Previous stomach issues and sleep deprivation have cleared up. Client reports sleeping better now.
Supervision reporting schedule adjusted to 8:00 AM on Tuesdays to resolve conflicts with client's classes and work.

next_episode_context: Jayden continues living at home, experiencing financial tension with his father. He is working at a restaurant and was recently given more hours, prompting a schedule change for supervision meetings to 8:00 AM on Tuesdays. He is enrolled in college but struggling with Algebra, which he may drop pending financial aid implications. He completed 5 hours of community service and tested negative on his recent UA, though he received a warning for testing a day late. A restitution review hearing is upcoming, and his previous stress-related stomach issues have resolved.
